hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE '(npm|pnpm|yarn|cargo)' && echo '[Hook] Long-running process detected — consider using run_in_background or a separate terminal' >&2 || true

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.md$' || exit 0; echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(ceo-decisions|company-briefing)' && echo 'Blocked: CEO-gated file — edit manually' >&2 && exit 2; echo "$FILE" | grep -qvE '(README|CLAUDE|codemap|plan-|research-|review-|session|\.claude/|cleared-queue|references/|docs/|specs/|decisions/|packages/agents/|logs/tasks/|logs/research/|topics/|shared-lessons/|training/|agents/|design/stitch/)' && echo 'Blocked: avoid creating loose .md files. Only README.md, CLAUDE.md, .claude/ files, and packages/agents/ system files are allowed.' >&2 && exit 2 || true
jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q 'git push' && echo '[Hook] Review your diff before pushing. Run /review-pr first.' >&2 || true

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'git commit' || exit 0; TOPLEVEL=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$TOPLEVEL" && ~/.claude/bin/check-stale-testids.sh

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(pnpm test|vitest run|npx jest|tsc --noEmit|pnpm run lint|npm run lint|npm run build|pnpm build|gh issue list|gh run view|docker logs|kubectl logs|git diff)' || exit 0; echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'ctx-exec' && exit 0; echo '[Hook] ⛔ Large-output command — wrap with ctx-exec to prevent context pollution:' >&2; echo "  ~/.claude/bin/ctx-exec \"intent\" $CMD" >&2; exit 2

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(rules/security\.md|CLAUDE\.md|settings\.json)' && exit 0; CONTENT=$(jq -r '.tool_input.content // .tool_input.new_string // ""' 2>/dev/null); echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE 'anthropic\.Anthropic\(|new Anthropic\(|AsyncAnthropic\(|ANTHROPIC_API_KEY|config/anthropic/key|@anthropic-ai/sdk' && echo '[⛔ BLOCKED] Direct Anthropic API key usage requires Super Permission from Lewis. Use claude -p / claude --print (subscription) instead. See rules/security.md § ANTHROPIC API KEY' >&2 && exit 2 || true
echo '[Hook] Blocked: use browse fetch <url> instead of WebFetch — isolated context, handles JS, strips noise. See ~/.claude/skills/browse/llms.txt' >&2 && exit 2
echo '[Hook] Blocked: use browse fetch <url> instead of WebSearch — isolated context, handles JS, strips noise. See ~/.claude/skills/browse/llms.txt' >&2 && exit 2

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.md$' || exit 0; [ -f "$FILE" ] || exit 0; LINES=$(grep -c '[^[:space:]]' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); HAS_HEADING=$(grep -c '^#' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); HAS_PLACEHOLDER=$(grep -cE '^\[|^TODO|^\.\.\.' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); [ "$HAS_HEADING" -eq 0 ] && echo '[Hook] .md missing heading — add a # title' >&2; [ "$LINES" -lt 5 ] && echo "[Hook] .md too sparse ($LINES lines) — every .md must justify its token cost" >&2; [ "$HAS_PLACEHOLDER" -gt 0 ] && echo '[Hook] .md has unfilled placeholders — complete or remove them' >&2; true
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$' && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); [ -f "$FILE" ] && grep -n 'console\.log' "$FILE" && echo '[Hook] console.log found — remove before committing' >&2 || true

HOOK=$(cat); OUTPUT=$(echo "$HOOK" | jq -r '.tool_response.output // ""' 2>/dev/null); BYTES=${#OUTPUT}; if [ "$BYTES" -gt 5120 ]; then KB=$((BYTES / 1024)); echo "[ctx] Large output: ${KB}KB in context. Next time use: ~/.claude/bin/ctx-exec \"intent\" command" >&2; fi; true
jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q 'grep -r' && echo '[Hook] Prefer mgrep over grep -r for ~50% token reduction' >&2 || true
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.py$' && pyright "$FILE" 2>&1 | grep -E '(error|warning)' | head -20 >&2 || true
~/.claude/hooks/validate-queue-hook.sh
~/.claude/hooks/schema-sync-hook.sh
~/.claude/hooks/validate-model-hint.sh
~/.claude/hooks/memory-persistence/observe.sh
~/.claude/hooks/memory-persistence/session-end.sh
~/.claude/hooks/memory-persistence/pre-compact.sh
~/.claude/hooks/memory-persistence/session-start.sh
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude needs your attention" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null || true
~/.claude/hooks/memory-persistence/mem0-extract.sh
